title: Message

remote_id.description: The third-party API ID of the matching object.

created_at.description: The datetime that this object was created by Merge.

modified_at.description: The datetime that this object was modified by Merge.

user_id.description: The user that sent the message.

conversation_id.description: The conversation this message belongs to.

subject_line.description: The subject line of the message.

root_message_id.description: The root message this message belongs to.

remote_created_at.description: When the third party's conversation was created.

remote_updated_at.description: When the third party's conversation was updated.

remote_was_deleted.description: Indicates whether or not this object has been deleted in the third party platform. Full coverage deletion detection is a premium add-on. Native deletion detection is offered for free with limited coverage. [Learn more](https://docs.merge.dev/integrations/hris/supported-features/).

description:
# The Message Object
### Description
The `Message` object is used to represent a message within the Chat account.
### Usage Example
Fetch from the `GET /api/chat/v1/messages` endpoint and view their message.
